itinerary.title: Arrival in Shimla and Mall Road Evening Walk
itinerary.description: Arrive in Shimla and transfer to your hotel. In the evening, enjoy a relaxing walk along the famous Mall Road to explore local shops and try local street food. Visit Scandal Point and the Ridge for beautiful sunset views over the mountain valleys.

itinerary.title: Excursion to Kufri and Fagu Valley
itinerary.description: After breakfast, depart on a day excursion to Kufri, located about 16 km away. Explore the Himalayan Nature Park, take a scenic horse ride, and admire the valleys of Fagu. Depending on the season, you can enjoy optional yak rides or winter skiing before returning to Shimla.

itinerary.title: Shimla Heritage and Jakhu Temple Tour
itinerary.description: Visit the Jakhu Temple, home to the iconic giant Hanuman statue and panoramic viewpoints. Explore colonial British architecture at Christ Church and the Gaiety Theatre. In the afternoon, take a trek through the pine forests to Chadwick Falls, or optionally enjoy a ride on the Kalka-Shimla Toy Train.

itinerary.title: Day Excursion to Mashobra and Craignano Nature Park
itinerary.description: Enjoy a day trip to the quiet town of Mashobra, known for its sprawling apple orchards and quiet forest walks. Spend time at Craignano Nature Park, or opt for a trek to Shali Tibba if you are looking for an adventure. Return to Shimla for a free evening.

itinerary.title: Lakkar Bazaar Shopping and Departure
itinerary.description: After breakfast, check out of your hotel. Spend your final morning shopping for local wooden handicrafts at Lakkar Bazaar, before your private transfer to Kalka or Chandigarh for your return journey.

title: Shimla Getaway
description: Escape to the hills with this 5-day Shimla vacation package. Explore historic British landmarks, hike pine-covered trails in Mashobra and Kufri, and experience mountain scenery with premium transfers and stays.
highlights: Scenic walks along the historic Shimla Ridge and Mall Road
Day trip to Kufri for horse riding and alpine nature parks
Guided cultural tours of Christ Church and Jakhu Temple
Excursion to the quiet orchards and forests of Mashobra
